text:
(a) U.S. Highway 80 in the town of Sunnyvale is designated as a Blue Star Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as a Blue Star Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.082 (Corporal David Slaton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B. 1093 ), Sec. 22.001(46), eff. September 1, 2013.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.086 — Blue Star Memorial Highway

(a) U.S. Highway 80 in the town of Sunnyvale is designated as a Blue Star Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as a Blue Star Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.082 (Corporal David Slaton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B. 1093 ), Sec. 22.001(46), eff. September 1, 2013.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 830 (H.B.3208), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2011.*

erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.082 (Corporal David Slaton Memorial Highway) by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B. 1093 ), Sec. 22.001(46), eff. September 1, 2013.
